name: Giant Forest Rat
description: A rat the size of a dog with razor-sharp teeth.
deathMessage: The Giant Forest Rat squeals and collapses!

name: Wild Boar
description: A tusked beast charging through the underbrush.
deathMessage: The Wild Boar crashes to the ground with a final snort!

name: Forest Bandit
description: A desperate outlaw hiding among the trees.
deathMessage: The Forest Bandit falls to his knees and begs for mercy!

name: Highway Robber
description: A skilled thief who preys on travelers.
deathMessage: The Highway Robber drops his stolen goods and flees!

name: Wolf Pack
description: A group of hungry wolves hunting as one.
deathMessage: The wolves scatter into the darkness, whimpering!

name: Plains Lion
description: A massive feline predator stalking the grasslands.
deathMessage: The Plains Lion lets out a final roar and falls!

name: Rogue Centaur
description: A half-man, half-horse warrior wielding a massive bow.
deathMessage: The Centaur rears up and crashes to the earth!

name: Sea Serpent
description: A massive snake-like creature rising from the waves.
deathMessage: The Sea Serpent sinks beneath the waves with a tremendous splash!

name: Cave Troll
description: A hulking beast with stone-like skin dwelling in darkness.
deathMessage: The Cave Troll crumbles into a pile of rubble!

name: Shadow Wyrm
description: A serpentine beast cloaked in living darkness.
deathMessage: The Shadow Wyrm dissolves into wisps of darkness!

name: Mountain Giant
description: A towering giant hurling boulders from the peaks.
deathMessage: The Mountain Giant tumbles down the mountainside!

name: Ancient Dragon
description: The most feared creature in all the realm. Few survive its wrath.
deathMessage: The Ancient Dragon lets out one final blast of flame and crashes to the earth!

name: Dark Spider
description: A massive spider the size of a horse, dripping venom.
deathMessage: The Dark Spider curls up and dies, its legs twitching!

name: Griffin
description: A majestic beast with the body of a lion and wings of an eagle.
deathMessage: The Griffin screeches and takes flight, defeated!

name: Ice Drake
description: A frost-breathing dragon cousin that rules the frozen peaks.
deathMessage: The Ice Drake shatters into crystalline fragments!

name: Living Scarecrow
description: A scarecrow animated by dark magic, stalking the fields.
deathMessage: The Scarecrow collapses into a pile of straw and rags!

name: Dust Devil
description: A swirling vortex of sand and fury on the open plains.
deathMessage: The Dust Devil disperses into a gentle breeze!

name: Pirate Raider
description: A cutlass-wielding sea dog with a mean streak.
deathMessage: The Pirate drops his sword and surrenders!

name: Siren
description: A beautiful creature whose song lures the unwary to their doom.
deathMessage: The Siren's song fades to silence as she vanishes beneath the waves!

name: Enchanted Knight
description: An ancient warrior animated by the garden's magic.
deathMessage: The Enchanted Knight salutes you before crumbling to dust!

name: Garden Golem
description: A massive construct of stone and vines guarding the King's Garden.
deathMessage: The Golem crumbles apart, flowers sprouting from the rubble!
